description: Letter from Perahḥya b. Yosef (Yiju) to 'the glory of the merchants' Abū l-Fakhr Saʿadya b. Ibrāhīm Ibn al-Amshāṭī. Fragment (upper part). The letter opens with rhymed blessings in Hebrew, then switches to Judaeo-Arabic and mentions Passover and Shavuʿot. Also mentions sending a book (al-taʾlīf).
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
